name: devops-status-mcp-server
description: Check vendor status pages, inspect SSL/TLS certificates, verify DNS propagation, and get incident-response playbooks.

DEVOPS_STATUS_ALLOW_PRIVATE_TARGETS.title: Allow Private Targets
DEVOPS_STATUS_ALLOW_PRIVATE_TARGETS.description: When 'true', disables SSRF guards for user-supplied URLs and domains. For trusted local/intranet deployments only. Default: false (guards enabled).

DEVOPS_STATUS_DISABLE_ACTIVE_PROBES.title: Disable Active Probes
DEVOPS_STATUS_DISABLE_ACTIVE_PROBES.description: When 'true', omits the arbitrary-target probe tools (devops_check_dns, devops_check_certs) from the registered tool surface; the five vendor-registry/incident tools remain. For shared/public multi-tenant instances. Default: false (both tools registered).
